prestazioni: 1.5L 1NZ-FE engine (or 2NZ-FE for early models) forced-induction conversion using a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger with a custom 264°/264° camshaft profile from Tomei for optimized low-end torque, paired with a HKS Super SQV4 blow-off valve to prevent compressor surge under aggressive shifting

Full 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by Fujitsubo Giken, featuring a 4-2-1 header design with unequal-length primaries to maximize scavenging, terminating in a 100mm titanium-tipped muffler for weight reduction and aggressive sound tuning

Custom ECU reflash via Haltech Elite 1500 standalone unit with flex-fuel compatibility, mapped specifically for 98 RON + E85 blends, targeting 180-200whp (depending on fuel) with a 7,500 RPM redline and optimized ignition timing for the 1NZ-FE’s 10.5:1 compression ratio
estetica: TRD-inspired widebody conversion kit by Veilside, specifically the 'Fortune 03' front bumper lip and rear over-fenders, modified to fit the Sienta’s 2,750mm wheelbase with custom carbon fiber side skirts for reduced weight and improved aerodynamics

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 15x7 +38 wheels in matte gunmetal, wrapped in 195/50R15 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires for optimal grip, paired with D2 Racing coilovers (1.5-way adjustable dampers) with 30mm front and 25mm rear lowering for aggressive stance and improved handling

Full custom interior overhaul featuring Bride Zeta III bucket seats in black Alcantara with red stitching, a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a custom roll cage by AutoPower Industries (4-point bolt-in, TIG-welded) painted in Toyota Racing Development (TRD) red for structural rigidity and motorsport aesthetics
